$comment:
=== STINGER SOUND ASSET ===
A short one-shot audio clip (level-up, achievement, round-end, etc.).
Rojo will create a Sound instance named 'Stinger' at the path
  ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Audio.Stingers.Stinger
whenever this file is present on disk.

=== ASSET ID ===
Replace rbxassetid://123456 with the real Toolbox / Open Cloud asset ID.
Use rbxthumb:// URLs only for decals — SoundId always takes rbxassetid://.

=== PROPERTIES ===
SoundId  : rbxassetid://123456
Volume   : 0.5  (half-volume; adjust per callsite or via SoundService)
Looped   : false by default (Roblox engine default — omitted intentionally)

=== USAGE ===
Require the Audio manager (or reference directly) and call :Play() on the
Sound.  Do not set RollOffMaxDistance here; stingers are non-positional and
should be played through SoundService:PlayLocalSound() or parented to
SoundService at runtime by the Audio system.
